summary: Iteration 4 (UX polish): validated 8/8 features end-to-end. Backend pytest 14/14 passing (3 new test classes added: hard-delete-with-link-check, PATCH /campos flags persistence, convocatorias switcher listing). Frontend: switcher lists both convocatorias (INC2026 + prueba), inline flag toggle works and persists across reload, popover '+ añadir' shows 6 switches, catálogos rendered as SortableTable with correct headers, hard-delete enforces link-check (error toast on linked, hard-delete on unlinked), Resumen has '¿Qué tipos de comparación existen?' section, Desempates dialog shows 'Tipo de comparación' + 'opciones del sistema'.

issues: Uses native window.confirm() instead of shadcn AlertDialog — inconsistent UX with rest of app. Functionally OK but less polished. Consider AlertDialog for confirmation.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Replace window.confirm() in CatalogosPanel.del() with shadcn AlertDialog for consistent UX with the rest of the configuration module.
critical_code_review_comments: InlineFlagsEditor PATCH endpoint is built as `/campos/${id}` — confirmed it correctly hits PATCH /api/campos/{id} via the api client. No issues.
DELETE /api/catalogos/{id} now correctly returns 409 with detail mentioning 'vinculado a N campo(s)' when linked, and performs hard delete (not soft) when unlinked.
CatalogosPanel uses window.confirm() — works but is inconsistent with rest of app that uses dialog patterns; minor UX nit only.
seed_data_creation: During delete-flow test, 'Enfoque Poblacional' catalogo was hard-deleted then immediately re-created via POST /api/catalogos to preserve seed state. Two ephemeral test campos (test_vinc_campo_*, test_hd_campo_*) from prior iterations were cleaned via DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression test suite: /app/backend/tests/test_config_module.py — 14 tests passing. Two convocatorias in seed: INC2026 (codigo=INC2026, nombre=Iniciativas Comunitarias Antioquia 2026) and 'prueba' (codigo='', nombre=prueba). Note: 'prueba' has empty codigo — verify if that is intentional. data-testids in use: conv-switcher, tab-{resumen,campos,catalogos,criterios,desempates}, flag-{campoId}-{flagKey}-on, flags-edit-{campoId}, view-vals-{catId}, edit-cat-{catId}, del-cat-{catId}. CatalogosPanel uses native window.confirm() — Playwright must register page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) to bypass.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions found. All 8 review-request features verified working end-to-end.
